name: [GRIDHAND] Reporting Agent - Monthly: review count + rating average → send performance re

gridhand.scenario: Monthly: review count + rating average → send performance report
gridhand.description: At the start of each month, GRIDHAND automatically compiles a performance report for the business owner by aggregating review counts and rating averages from platforms like Yelp and Google Reviews, then sends a concise summary to the owner's email via Gmail, highlighting areas of improvement and successes, allowing for data-driven decisions to enhance customer satisfaction and ultimately drive sales. This workflow is triggered on the first day of every month at 8am, ensuring the owner has a timely and comprehensive overview of their business's online reputation. By receiving this monthly report, the business owner can swiftly identify trends, adjust marketing strategies, and boost their overall online presence to attract more customers.
